full_text:
Feng Li 馮禮
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Feng Li (馮禮). Served Yuan Shang. Punished for intoxication. Betrayed to Wei. Killed by Shen Pei. Feng Li was affiliated with Yuan Shang and the Wei Kingdom. Feng Li lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
